# Rip Packs City

## Overview
Rip Packs City (RPC) is a collector intelligence platform for digital collectibles on the Flow blockchain. Founded by Trevor Dillon-Bond, an official Portland Trail Blazers Team Captain on NBA Top Shot. Five collections are supported: NBA Top Shot, NFL All Day, LaLiga Golazos, Disney Pinnacle, and UFC Strike.

## Collections

### NBA Top Shot — /nba-top-shot
- Contract: 0x0b2a3299cc857e29 (TopShot)
- Tiers: Common, Fandom, Rare, Legendary, Ultimate
- Series: S1, S2, Summer 2021, S3, S4, 2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26
- Features: Overview, Collection (wallet analytics), Packs (EV calculator), Sniper, Market, Sets, Analytics
- Edition keys formatted setID:playID

### NFL All Day — /nfl-all-day
- Contract: 0xe4cf4bdc1751c65d (AllDay)
- Tiers: Common, Rare, Legendary, Ultimate
- Features: Overview, Collection, Packs, Sniper, Sets, Badges (Rookie, Playoffs, Super Bowl, Pro Bowl, First Touchdown), Analytics

### LaLiga Golazos — /laliga-golazos
- Contract: 0x87ca73a41bb50ad5 (Golazos)
- Tiers: Common, Rare, Legendary, Ultimate
- Badges: El Clásico, Eterno Rival, Ídolos, Estrellas, Team Europa, Tiki Taka
- Features: Overview, Collection, Packs, Sniper, Sets, Analytics

### Disney Pinnacle — /disney-pinnacle
- Contract: 0xedf9df96c92f4595 (Pinnacle)
- Variants: Standard, Limited, Special, Premium, Elite, Legendary
- Features: Overview, Collection, Sniper, Analytics

### UFC Strike — /ufc
- Contract: 0x329feb3ab062d289 (UFC_NFT) — original Flow contract; collection migrated to Aptos
- 247 NFTs indexed on RPC
- Features: Overview, Collection, Sniper

## What RPC Does
- **Wallet Analytics**: Real-time FMV, badge detection, serial premiums, Flowty asks
- **Sniper Feed**: Deal finder comparing live listings against FMV across NBA Top Shot and Flowty
- **Pack Tools**: Expected value calculator with pull odds
- **Badge Tracker**: Rookie Year, Top Shot Debut, Championship, Fresh, computed serial badges
- **Set Intelligence**: Completion tracking and bottleneck moments
- **Analytics**: Acquisition origin, tier breakdown, series breakdown, liquid vs locked FMV, clarity score
- **Public Profiles**: Shareable trophy cases at /share/[wallet]

## FMV Methodology (v1.5.0)
Weighted average price (WAP) with days_since_sale recency decay and sales_count_30d volume weighting. Refreshed every 20 minutes. Three confidence tiers: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW. Illiquid editions use ask_proxy fallback (floor ask × 0.90).

## Technical Details
- Next.js 16 App Router with server-side rendering
- Supabase (PostgreSQL) for storage
- Flow Client Library (@onflow/fcl) for chain integration
- On-chain sales indexer for NFTStorefrontV2.ListingCompleted and TopShotMarketV3.MomentPurchased
- Public FMV API at /api/fmv (single + batch)

## URL Structure
- Homepage: /
- Per-collection prefix: /{collection-id}/{page}
  Example pages: /overview, /collection, /packs, /sniper, /badges, /sets, /market, /analytics
- Shareable wallet cards: /share/[wallet]
- Profiles: /profile/[username]

## Contact
- Twitter: @RipPacksCity
- Website: https://rip-packs-city.vercel.app
